items.title: Amazon's Strategic Bets On Emerging Tech Make Today's Price Irresistible
items.description: Amazon is a top buy at $229, with AI, satellite tech, and new ventures fueling growth. Read here for an investment analysis of AMZN stock.

items.title: Why Google Stock Would Have Been Better Off if Alphabet Had Been Broken Up.
items.description: Alphabet likely won’t be split up in any meaningful way. Investors are relieved, but they might have done better with a full dismantling of the tech giant.

items.title: Amazon Pauses Delivery Fleet Redeployments After Outcry Over Repair Costs
items.description: The e-commerce giant said it would suspend reassignment of vans after delivery-company owners complained about surprise repair bills.

items.title: Amazon Prime Sharing Crackdown Hits Millions as Invitee Program Shuts Down
items.description: Amazon Prime Crackdown: Free Shipping Sharing Outside Homes Eliminated

items.title: Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN)’s Figuring Out The Returns Of AI GPU Investment, Says Jim Cramer
items.description: We recently published 9 Stocks On Jim Cramer’s Radar . Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer recently discussed. Cramer’s thoughts about Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) have been interesting to say the least since the firm’s latest earnings report. These results saw the shares struggle in the aftermath as cloud computing growth (read: AI) […]
